languages.text: Оставшийся править Зарковым губернатор Иждриг Батошски вел политику максимальной независимости от других миров и оставался верен лишь Богу-Императору и Лорд-капитану. Солдаты, родившиеся и воспитанные на Заркове, носили славу опаснейших бойцов в Просторе Коронус.

Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only the God-Emperor and the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.
languages.original_text: Оставшийся править Зарковым губернатор Иждриг Батошски вел политику максимальной независимости от других миров и оставался верен лишь Богу-Императору и Лорд-капитану. Солдаты, родившиеся и воспитанные на Заркове, носили славу опаснейших бойцов в Просторе Коронус.

traits.locale_text: Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only the God-Emperor and the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.

Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only one person, the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.

Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only one person, the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.

Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only the God-Emperor and the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.

languages.text: 惑星を統治するためにザルコフに留まったイズドリック・バトシュスキー知事は、他の世界との最大限の独立を政策として、唯一の忠誠を主艦長に捧げた。ザルコフで生まれた兵士たちは、コロナス・エクスパンションで最も危険な戦士として知られていた。
languages.original_text: Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only one person, the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: 惑星を統治するためにザルコフに留まったイズドリック・バトシュスキー知事は、他の世界との最大限の独立を政策として、唯一の忠誠を主艦長に捧げた。ザルコフで生まれた兵士たちは、コロナス・エクスパンションで最も危険な戦士として知られていた。

languages.text: 总督伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基坐镇扎尔科夫，负责监管该行星。他推行极端的孤立政策，与其他世界保持着最大限度的距离。他只效忠于神皇和舰长大人。在扎尔科夫土生土长的士兵，以其骁勇凶悍闻名整个科罗努斯扩区。
languages.original_text: Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only the God-Emperor and the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: 总督伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基坐镇扎尔科夫，负责监管该行星。他推行极端的孤立政策，与其他世界保持着最大限度的距离。他只效忠于神皇和舰长大人。在扎尔科夫土生土长的士兵，以其骁勇凶悍闻名整个科罗努斯扩区。

languages.text: Le gouverneur Izdrig Batoshski, qui était resté sur Zarkov à des fins de supervision, dirigea la planète en prônant son indépendance vis-à-vis des autres mondes et n'accorda jamais sa loyauté qu'à l'Empereur-Dieu et {mf|au seigneur-capitaine|à la seigneure-capitaine}. Les soldats nés et élevés sur Zarkov avaient la réputation d'être les plus dangereux combattants des Étendues de Koronus.
languages.original_text: Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only the God-Emperor and the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: Le gouverneur Izdrig Batoshski, qui était resté sur Zarkov à des fins de supervision, dirigea la planète en prônant son indépendance vis-à-vis des autres mondes et n'accorda jamais sa loyauté qu'à l'Empereur-Dieu et {mf|au seigneur-capitaine|à la seigneure-capitaine}. Les soldats nés et élevés sur Zarkov avaient la réputation d'être les plus dangereux combattants des Étendues de Koronus.

languages.text: El gobernador Izdrig Batoshski permaneció en Zarkov para supervisar el planeta con una política de independencia máxima de otros mundos. Tan solo permaneció leal al Dios Emperador y a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán. Los soldados nacidos y criados en Zarkov adquirieron fama de ser los guerreros más peligrosos de la Extensión de Koronus.
languages.original_text: Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only the God-Emperor and the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: El gobernador Izdrig Batoshski permaneció en Zarkov para supervisar el planeta con una política de independencia máxima de otros mundos. Tan solo permaneció leal al Dios Emperador y a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán. Los soldados nacidos y criados en Zarkov adquirieron fama de ser los guerreros más peligrosos de la Extensión de Koronus.

languages.text: Gezegeni denetlemek için Zarkov'da kalan Vali İzdrig Batoshski, diğer dünyalardan azami bağımsızlık politikası izledi ve yalnızca Tanrı İmparator'la Lord Kaptan'a sadık kaldı. Zarkov'da doğup büyüyen askerler, Koronus Enginliği'ndeki en tehlikeli savaşçılar olarak ün saldı.
languages.original_text: Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only the God-Emperor and the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: Gezegeni denetlemek için Zarkov'da kalan Vali İzdrig Batoshski, diğer dünyalardan azami bağımsızlık politikası izledi ve yalnızca Tanrı İmparator'la Lord Kaptan'a sadık kaldı. Zarkov'da doğup büyüyen askerler, Koronus Enginliği'ndeki en tehlikeli savaşçılar olarak ün saldı.

languages.text: Gouverneur Izdrig Batoshski, der auf Zarkov blieb, um den Planeten zu überwachen, verfolgte eine Politik maximaler Unabhängigkeit von anderen Welten und war bliebt nur dem Gottimperator und dem Lord Captain treu ergeben. Die auf Zarkov geborenen und aufgewachsenen Soldaten galten als die gefährlichsten Kämpfer der Koronus-Ausdehnung.
languages.original_text: Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only the God-Emperor and the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.

Die auf Zarkov geborenen und aufgewachsenen Soldaten galten als die gefährlichsten Kämpfer der Koronus-Ausdehnung.
